{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Blood spirits
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|An army of blood spirits filled a massive chamber.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
